themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 7 verses. Commentary leans on "Jacob Bar-Salibi: 'On this Caius said that, just as in the Flood the heavenly bodies were not...". Cross references echo "Light".

themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 8 verses. Commentary leans on "Oecumenius on Commentary on Revelation: Perhaps someone who is very meticulous might analyze...".
